name: Logo + Quote Ribbon
description: Compact social-proof ribbon — a row of customer logos doubles as a tab strip; clicking a logo cross-fades a one-line pull-quote underneath. The tightest testimonial slot in the library.

descriptions.descriptive: Six-up logo grid sits between hairline rules; the active logo carries full opacity while the others sit at 50%. Below the strip, a one-line blockquote with author name and title cross-fades whenever a different logo is selected.
descriptions.usage: Use as compact social proof above pricing or below a hero — when you have brand-name customers but don't want to commit a full testimonial section. Replaces the generic 'Trusted by' logo cloud while doing the same recognition work.
descriptions.audienceFit: B2B SaaS with marquee logos, agency portfolios listing client brands, conference sponsor recognition, and any site whose customers carry recognition value on their own.
